task.title: Run Discovery Only
task.shortdesc: Run the discovery scanner when you need package facts without planning or mutation.

prereq.p: Have read access to the package root directory.
For first-time onboarding, use this task to build confidence with package inventory output before you generate a plan.

step.cmd: Run discovery and write the JSON report.
Optional: print the full report to stdout for quick review.
Fail the command if discovery invariants fail.
Check high-level counts and invariant status.

result.p: You have a read-only inventory artifact for triage, planning input generation, or plugin analysis.
result.codeblock: summary: map: >= 1 topic: >= 1 media: >= 0 invariants.passed: true or false (explicit)
